# Saurabh

> Agent-readable context for Saurabh's portfolio website.

Saurabh is a design engineer and product builder based in India. He builds small, fast tools for developers and crypto products, mostly with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Rust, Cloudflare, and Framer Motion.

Website: https://saura3h.xyz
Projects: https://saura3h.xyz/projects
Resume: https://saura3h.xyz/resume.pdf
GitHub: https://github.com/starc007
X: https://x.com/saurra3h
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/starc007
Email: saurabh10102@gmail.com
Calendar: https://cal.com/saurra3h/30min

## Primary Focus

- Design engineering and frontend systems
- Developer tools and AI-agent-friendly software
- Crypto-native products, wallets, payments, and infrastructure
- High-performance React, Next.js, TypeScript, Rust, and Cloudflare projects

## Current Work

- Frontend Engineer at NodeOps
- Building beUI, a bespoke motion component system for React with agent-friendly registry endpoints
- Exploring agentic payments, AI + crypto, Tempo, Solana, MPP, and wallet safety systems

## Notable Projects

- beUI v2: bespoke motion components for React with llms.txt and registry endpoints.
- Hydra Agent: autonomous Uniswap v4 LP management on Cloudflare Workers.
- Programmable Virtual Addresses: Tempo smart contracts for programmable token payment splits.
- Sentinel: reputation and limits system for AI agent wallets.
- agent-operator: TypeScript SDK for agent wallets with safety rules and Telegram approvals.
- Relay CLI: Rust CLI for the Relay cross-chain bridge and swap protocol.
- Wave App: social wallet app on Solana with 300+ users.
- DateMate: Telegram matching bot with 1,100+ users.
- Sanchar: professional networking product scaled to 5,000+ users.

## More Context

For a fuller profile, project inventory, and agent guidance, read:

- https://saura3h.xyz/llms-full.txt
